reading.title: Reading: Lost and found notice
reading.passage: LOST: A young woman, about 25 years old. She is tall, with long, curly blonde hair. Her coat is red. Please contact the front desk if you have any information.

questions.question: She is friendly.
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn không nói về tính cách của cô.

reading.title: Reading: About my best friend
reading.passage: My best friend is Mai. She has a kind heart and she is always calm. She isn't lazy at all; she has a lot of energy. Sometimes she is busy with work, but she always has time for her friends.

questions.question: What kind of person is Mai?
questions.explanation: "She has a kind heart and she is always calm."
